message:
feat(db): indexed reservation conflict detection with BTreeMap prefix lookups

Replace O(n*m) linear scan of active reservations with a
ReservationConflictIndex that partitions patterns into exact-path
(BTreeMap for prefix-range queries), glob-by-prefix, and root-glob
buckets. Exact-vs-exact conflicts use ancestor/descendant range scans;
exact-vs-glob and glob-vs-glob use targeted bucket lookups before
falling back to root globs. Switch from CompiledPattern::new to
CompiledPattern::cached for Arc-based reuse.

Add two conflict-direction tests: exact request hitting an existing
glob reservation, and glob request hitting an existing exact path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
